Implemented `task_351d6448` as a stacked-frames extrapolation task package. The verifier covers the three official-consistent progression types in this family: a growing horizontal bar, a translated row motif, and a left-to-right recolor over a fixed 3-row pyramid support. I used the summary hint as a starting hypothesis because it matched the official examples; `notes.md` was not needed. No new primitive was added.

Verification passed end to end: `3/3` official examples passed, the shared builder produced `1000` examples, `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 351d6448` passed `1000/1000`, and the generated previews looked consistent with the task family rather than generic noise.
